message:
fix(security): replace pipe-delimited signing payload in universal_verifier_sdk with length-prefixed hash

compute_signing_payload() now builds the hash directly with length-prefixed
field encoding instead of joining parts with "|" and double-hashing. This
prevents delimiter-collision ambiguity in capsule signature computation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
